welcome.title: Welcome to Oasis
welcome.lede: A platform of apps to learn, create, play — and occasionally be surprised along the way.
welcome.quote: The most precious discoveries are rarely the ones we were looking for, but those that quietly find us on the way.

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join the Oasis platform
register.success: A confirmation email has been sent. Click the link it contains to activate your account.
register.conflict: An account already exists with these details.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access Oasis
login.verifiedDescription: Your email has been verified, you can now sign in.
login.verificationFailed: The confirmation link is invalid or expired.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
forgot.neutralDescription: If this address is linked to an account, a reset link has been sent.

reset.title: Reset password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password
reset.success: Password updated! Redirecting to sign in…
reset.tokenInvalid: The reset link is invalid or expired.

cgu.title: Terms of service
cgu.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully.
cgu.body: By using Oasis, you accept these terms of service.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please confirm your email address before signing in.

home.heading: Applications
home.subtitle: Welcome to Oasis, your application platform.

trading.description: Portfolio tracking, analysis and market alerts

maze.description: Find the key and escape the maze

maze.instructions: Use arrow keys or the touch pad to move
